method: Zone lift = (topic's share of the zone) / (zone's share of the zoned+topiced corpus). Lift suppressed when the cell has < 3 records. Labels are the top-15 c-TF-IDF terms after the race/police-shorthand blocklist; see the About page for how the filter works.
